_pmagent_note: Managed by pmagent. If you maintain your own .claude/settings.json, pmagent init will write this template to .claude/settings.pmagent.json instead so you can merge by hand. Hook commands run pmagent through Python module execution so they do not depend on the `pmagent` console script being on PATH. If you run pmagent from a virtualenv, change the commands to that venv's python with `-m pmagent.cli hook <name>`.

hooks.command: python3 -m pmagent.cli hook session_bootstrap || python -m pmagent.cli hook session_bootstrap
python3 -m pmagent.cli hook state_surface || python -m pmagent.cli hook state_surface
python3 -m pmagent.cli hook pre_bash_guard || python -m pmagent.cli hook pre_bash_guard
python3 -m pmagent.cli hook pre_write_guard || python -m pmagent.cli hook pre_write_guard
python3 -m pmagent.cli hook post_mutation_check || python -m pmagent.cli hook post_mutation_check
python3 -m pmagent.cli hook response_validator || python -m pmagent.cli hook response_validator
